name: Paladin Écarlate
description: Officier d'élite en armure de parade renforcée, cape asymétrique rouge carmin flottant derrière lui. Mène les assauts débarqués avec une épée thermique et un bouclier énergétique hexagonal. Symbole de la pureté martienne.
prompt: Sci-fi dark conceptual art, Martian Purist faction, aggressive high-tech brutalism. Sleek matte crimson red and obsidian black armor and plating. Sharp angular designs, imposing wedge shapes, completely devoid of soft curves. Faceless dehumanizing visors, glowing neon red energy accents, clean pristine surfaces with zero exposed wiring. Elite officer with asymmetric half-cape, thermal energy sword in one hand, hexagonal energy shield in the other, angular shoulder plates.
